originalSource: Azure Logic Apps runtime reference corpus
notes: Bundles both 'AzureBlob' and 'azurequeues' service-provider connections — the two are independent but share the same Storage account. Connection-string variant; for managed identity, switch parameterSetName to an AAD variant. Display name normalised to our '###display-name###' placeholder convention. Note the connector keys ('AzureBlob' PascalCase, 'azurequeues' lowercase) match the upstream service-provider IDs verbatim — do not rename.
